title: Summon Entity Behavior
description: Allows the mob to attack the player by summoning other entities.

summon_choices.title: Summon Choices
summon_choices.description:
List of spells for the mob to use to summon entities.

Properties:
• cast_duration (float)
• cooldown_time (float) = 0
• do_casting (boolean) = true
• filters (object)
• max_activation_range (float) = 32
• min_activation_range (float) = 1
• particle_color (string)
• sequence
• ... and 2 more properties

cast_duration.title: Cast Duration
cast_duration.description: Time in seconds the spell casting will take.

cooldown_time.title: Cooldown Time
cooldown_time.description: Time in seconds the mob has to wait before using the spell again.

do_casting.title: Do Casting
do_casting.description: If true, the mob will do the casting animations and render spell particles.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Conditions that must be met for this summon choice to be valid.

max_activation_range.title: Max Activation Range
max_activation_range.description: Upper bound of the activation distance in blocks for this spell.

min_activation_range.title: Min Activation Range
min_activation_range.description: Lower bound of the activation distance in blocks for this spell.

particle_color.title: Particle Color
particle_color.description: The color of the particles for this spell. Can be an integer (ARGB) or a hex string like '#AARRGGBB'.

sequence.title: Sequence
sequence.description:
List of summon steps for the spell.

Properties:
• base_delay (float) = 0
• delay_per_summon (float) = 0
• entity_type (string)
• num_entities_spawned (int) = 1
• shape (string) = circle
• size (float) = 1
• sound_event (string)
• summon_cap (int) = 0
• ... and 2 more properties

base_delay.title: Base Delay
base_delay.description: Delay in seconds before this step starts.

delay_per_summon.title: Delay Per Summon
delay_per_summon.description: Delay in seconds between each entity summon.

num_entities_spawned.title: Num Entities Spawned
num_entities_spawned.description: Number of entities to spawn in this step.

shape.title: Shape
shape.description: Shape of the summon pattern: 'circle' or 'line'.

sound_event.title: Sound Event
sound_event.description: Sound event to play when summoning.

summon_cap.title: Summon Cap
summon_cap.description: Maximum number of entities that can be summoned.

summon_cap_radius.title: Summon Cap Radius
summon_cap_radius.description: Radius to check for existing summoned entities.

start_sound_event.title: Start Sound Event
start_sound_event.description: Sound event to play when casting starts.

weight.title: Weight
weight.description: Relative weight for random selection among summon choices.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
